text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 119 

MSIS_ID 

LABEL: State Assigned Beneficiary Unique Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is populated with the state-assigned unique identification number used to identify a 
Medicaid/CHIP enrolled beneficiary and any claims submitted to the system. Also referred to as the 
Medicaid Statistical Information System Identifier (MSIS_ID). This field is only populated in MMLEADIS 
if the CCW beneficiary identifier is not
